rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 24, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTS JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. and CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY N.A. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off Calendar. Moving party failed to comply with Court's August 24, 2012 order and failed to provide Court with copy of Second Amended Complaint per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZELDA L. STONE VS. MICHAEL CIANCI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 24, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT MELANIS LAWLESS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off Calendar. First Amended Complaint filed August 28, 2012. = (501/REQ)
